raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 740 extends skilled and trained workforce standards to emerging green industries including hydrogen manufacturing, biofuels manufacturing, and carbon dioxide capture.",
    "Senate Bill 740 aims to protect communities from dangerous factory accidents while growing the number of good-paying green energy jobs.",
    "A skilled and trained workforce ensures that workers are performing work in apprenticeable occupations.",
    "SB 740 will ensure that workers in industrial facilities have the training and skills to properly perform their jobs and help prevent accidents and toxic discharges that harm local communities.",
    "The bill will contribute to California’s emerging green workforce and help meet the state’s climate goals."
  ]
}
```
